import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_gcd_reveals_bug():
    """gcd(35, 21) would cause infinite recursion in the buggy version
    (a % b, b) instead of (b, a % b). Correct result is 7."""
    from source import gcd
    assert gcd(35, 21) == 7
